bug.actual_behavior: On a project where main.tex uses a custom wrapper macro like \\RegionalBodyInput{extraTex/1.立论依据.tex}, the generated report showed total_citations=0 even though the chapter contains many \\cite{...} calls; a warning also referenced extraTex/#1.tex.
evidence: ref_integrity_report.md: total_citations: 0; warning: missing tex file referenced: extraTex/#1.tex; chapter contains many \\cite{...} commands.
bug.expected_behavior: The skill should discover included chapter files and extract standard LaTeX citations such as \\cite{...} from NSFC project sources.
bug.impact: 这是由 skill 设计缺陷导致的真实环境问题，需要纳入后续修复闭环。
reproduction_steps: Run run_ref_alignment.py with --project-root . --main-tex main.tex --report-dir references --prepare --verify-online on a project using a custom wrapper macro for chapter input.
Inspect the generated ref_integrity_report.md and observe total_citations=0 despite cited chapter content.
bug.summary: nsfc-ref-alignment fails to extract citations from projects using custom body input macros and default citation config
bug.workaround: Directly scan the target chapter for citation commands and parse the project BibTeX file, then perform DOI/title verification manually.

bug.actual_behavior: On a project where main.tex uses a custom wrapper macro like \\RegionalBodyInput{extraTex/1.立论依据.tex}, the generated report showed total_citations=0 even though the chapter contains many \\cite{...} calls; a warning also referenced extraTex/#1.tex.
bug.expected_behavior: The skill should discover included chapter files and extract standard LaTeX citations such as \\cite{...} from NSFC project sources.
bug.summary: nsfc-ref-alignment fails to extract citations from projects using custom body input macros and default citation config
